title: Pass1Result
description: Coarse gump asset classification schema for Pass 1

file_id.description: Unique identifier for the asset file

gump_type.description: Specific UI element type, e.g. Button, Frame, Container, Paperdoll, Icon, etc. Use Unknown if uncertain.

shape.description: Visual shape: Rectangular, Circular, Irregular, etc.

style.description: Visual style: Stone, Wood, Metal, Ornate, etc.

function_guess.description: Inferred UI function based on appearance only. No lore.

visible_text.description: Any text visible in the image. Empty string if none.

is_paperdoll_related.description: True if image appears to be a wearable paperdoll layer

paperdoll_reason.description: Brief explanation if is_paperdoll_related is true, else empty

short_description.description: One sentence visual description. No lore or game knowledge.
